steps.title: Calculate slope using two table points
steps.content:
Use the slope formula $m = \frac{\Delta y}{\Delta x}$. Select any two points from the table—using $(0, n)$ and $(5, n+24)$:
$$m = \frac{(n+24) - n}{5 - 0} = \frac{24}{5}$$
The constant $n$ cancels completely in the numerator. Converting to decimal: $\frac{24}{5} = 4.8$.
